title: Vizhi Veekura Song Lyrics in Tamil
stanzas:
Naala naalum nillama neeli
suthikichu suthikichu
Polladha paarvai pallala pesa
sokki kichu sokka vechale Ya, yaaro

Karaicha karayila kanna thedi kaathirukka
kalicha kaadhala ketu varava
Naan ketu varava
naan ketu varava
naan kaaththa irava, tharava

Vizhi veekuraa verum vaarthaiyaa
variyaakki nee vaasikkira
Vazhi maathini nee enna vaattura
vinnukulla un vaakkula-ae

Unnoda konja neram
unna naan konja venum
unnala nenju paayum
unna paarkaiyila

Anju naalum unna kenji naalum
enna nenchila nenchila
enna mella vachcha iravula

kanne enna konjam kaathaa
kaadhal minjum kaettaa
kotti tharuven naane

Hey raasa rendu sollil lesa
sikka vechu ..
enna sokka vechu poraane

Unnala naalum nillama neeli
suthikichu suthikichu
Polladha paarvai pallala pesa
sokki kichu sokki kichu

Naala naalum nillama needi
suthikichu suthikichu
Polladha paarvai pallala pesa
sokki kichu sokka vechale Ya, yaaro

kalicha kaadhala ketu varava
Naan ketu varava
naan ketu varava
naan kaaththa irava, tharava

variyaakki nee vaasikkira
Vazhi maathini nee enna vaattura
vinnukulla un vaakkula-ae

unna naan konja venum
unnala nenju paayum
unna paarkaiyila

enna nenchila nenchila
enna mella vachcha iravula

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vizhi Veekura?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, expressing the feelings of a lover waiting for their beloved.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

The song is likely to be a romantic number that enhances the emotional connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Vizhi Veekura?

The song features the talented voices of Sai Smriti and Sai Abhyankkar.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics for Vizhi Veekura were penned by Adesh Krishna.

When was Vizhi Veekura released?

The song was released on July 8, 2025.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Vizhi Veekura encapsulates the feelings of love and yearning, making it a perfect romantic melody. Sung by the talented duo Sai Smriti and Sai Abhyankkar, the song's soothing vibe creates an intimate atmosphere. The lyrics by Adesh Krishna beautifully express the emotions of waiting and longing, resonating with anyone who has loved deeply. This enchanting track is sure to be a favorite for weddings and romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vizhi Veekura is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and longing. With the enchanting voices of Sai Smriti and Sai Abhyankkar, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has ever experienced love. The heartfelt lyrics by Adesh Krishna add a unique depth, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: Every day, the blue sky keeps spinning around. The beautiful gaze speaks softly, oh, who is it?
Searching for you with tears in my eyes, waiting for the love to come. Am I waiting? Am I waiting? Am I calling out, will you come?
Are your eyes just words? You live in a different way. What do you want to say to me in your words?
I need a little time with you, my heart will melt when I see you.
For five days, you have been in my thoughts, slowly settling in my mind at night.
Hey, don't you look at me a little? I will give you love, just listen to me.
Hey, my dear, I will say it in two words... I will say it softly.
Every day, the blue sky keeps spinning around. The beautiful gaze speaks softly, oh, who is it?
Every day, the blue sky keeps spinning around. The beautiful gaze speaks softly, oh, who is it?
Searching for you with tears in my eyes, waiting for the love to come. Am I waiting? Am I waiting? Am I calling out, will you come?
Are your eyes just words? You live in a different way. What do you want to say to me in your words?

For five days, you have been in my thoughts, slowly settling in my mind at night.
